javadoc_after: /** * A {@link FileFilter} providing conditional OR logic across a list of * file filters. This filter returns true if any filters in the * list return true. Otherwise, it returns false. * Checking of the file filter list stops when the first filter returns * true. * * @since Commons IO 1.0 * @version $Revision: 1.9 $ $Date: 2004/10/24 21:58:44 $ * * @author Steven Caswell */
